topic: What happens during a heart attack — minute by minute
caption:
Understanding what happens minute-by-minute during a heart attack isn't just knowledge — it's life-saving. 💔 From the moment a coronary artery is blocked, every second counts. Your heart muscle, starved of oxygen, begins to die, leading to irreversible damage if blood flow isn't restored quickly. Learn the critical timeline and why immediate action is paramount. Knowing these stages can empower you or a loved one to recognize symptoms and react swiftly, making all the difference in survival and recovery. Don't underestimate the power of knowing these vital facts. 🙏

💾 Save this so you don't lose it. Share with someone who needs to understand these critical moments. Follow @healthrecode for daily science-backed health insights that truly matter. Don't forget — your heart's health is in your hands, know the signs! ❤️
